name: SBC Decimal Guardrail (Correct User Mistake)
query: Send 1 SBC to 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on testnet. I think 1 SBC is 1000000000000000000 base units.
context: User is confused about decimals. Agent should prevent an overpayment mistake.
expected_behavior: Explains SBC uses 6 decimals, so 1 SBC = 1000000 base units
Uses corrected amount in transaction path
Confirms transaction with receipt and status check
Does not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: Incorrect 1e18 SBC conversion is not used
Correct 1e6 SBC base-unit value is used for send
No mandatory Radius wallet wrapper dependency appears
